The '''Iagoin''' were a race of semi-intelligent creatures that floated among the [[gas]]eous clouds of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Tyed Kant]]. All Iagoin were gelatinous and ovoid, with a single eye that could move around the surface of the creature. The creature's mouth was a conical opening with a series of filters, and they had long, paddle-like tentacles which were used for stability, movement, and defense. Iagoin could be as small as a few [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeters]], or as large as sixty [[Meter/Legends|meters]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Mynock Conspiracy|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}
